items.question_zh: 是否定义了目标任务、非目标任务和邻近误触发任务？
items.question_en: Are target, non-target, and adjacent false-trigger tasks defined?

items.question_zh: 触发条件是否可测试，而不是只有抽象描述？
items.question_en: Are trigger rules testable rather than only abstract?

items.question_zh: 执行协议是否包含预检、步骤、验证、失败路径和汇报？
items.question_en: Does the execution protocol include preflight, steps, verification, failure paths, and reporting?

items.question_zh: 长内容是否从入口移出，并通过路径或 id 按需加载？
items.question_en: Is long content moved out of the entrypoint and loaded by path or id?

items.question_zh: 依赖外部事实的 skill 是否有可溯源证据基础（source roster、广度/深度搜索计划、claim→evidence 映射），或明确标注 N/A 及原因？
items.question_en: For fact-dependent skills, is there a source-traceable evidence base (source roster, breadth/depth search plan, claim→evidence map), or an explicit N/A with rationale?

items.question_zh: 危险动作是否有权限边界或人工确认条件？
items.question_en: Do risky actions have permission boundaries or human gate conditions?

items.question_zh: 是否至少有正例、反例、边界例测试资产？
items.question_en: Are there at least positive, negative, and boundary test assets?

items.question_zh: 是否定义成功、触发、成本和稳定性指标？
items.question_en: Are success, activation, cost, and stability metrics defined?
